faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are encouraged to bring their own clubs for the most authentic experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes between 2 to 3 hours, depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is The Back Nine Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes juniors. They offer programs suitable for younger golfers.
